title: VAL-26642 [UI/UX][CI] Merge Step
body:
FeatureOwner

MxJIRAissuekey,summary,issuetype,created,updated,duedate,assignee,reporter,priority,status,resolutionkey,summary,type,created,updated,due,assignee,reporter,priority,status,resolution67e031c3-c684-3aab-b7af-9bf49d41e788VAL-26642

 


Functional Questions:

QuestionAnswer

Is the final product details section in the merge stage is the same as the tag stage?  

yes but it's a different final product
What do we show during the creation of a final product?

display the available info with - for the missing ones until it is created 

status in progress

what do we show in case of failure of final product creation . current we show this


we can keep the same when the publishing altogether failed

currently we show 'Backport will start after integrating into x passes' as alert? Do we keep this the same?  

Yes

code shows 3 tabs?? Backport Changes & Backport Executions Summary

What are these? current design only shows backport executions summary

   

this is for old processes.

backport tab shows in code shows differnet views for cherry-pick in progress, cherry-pick failed, and cherry-pick successful that are not found in the desing

  

this is for old processes.

we can keep the design as is and copy code  for backward compatibility

no need to show branch details for the backport tab?? is it the same one that we have in the branch details?   


part of the legacy tab. to be kept in that tab

code shows in backport tab final product publishing component what should we show in the new desing
  

part of the legacy tab. to be kept in that tab

what should we show when backport is in progress?   

part of the legacy tab. to be kept in that tab

we now fivide failed and passed backports i see we merged in a new desing. but we also show alert for missing definitions what is that and should it be handled differently??  

the on demand backports table shows the processes that we were able to start with their status


we need another table

"Failed to Launch Backports" that shows the BP Definition Name 


In case a the failed to launch definiton was deleted, we show an erorr banner like it is now with the id of the definition


but place it above the tables

Technical Notes:

  •  Reuse same component as the upgrade process (including the buttons)
  • However we need a tab for Merge Request and For Backports when thwey exist
  • Make this component take as input an optional final product id, if passed, a final product details section is shown (same one displayed in the tag stage
  • Currenty we show info alert above the tow tabs saying  'Backport will start after integrating into x passes'

1.

Backport exeuction summary has logic when to show in progress when everything is empty including failedbakcports, missing definitions, and integrate destination branch, with a slightly idfferent message

Backport processes will start after changes are integrated into ${integrateDestinationBranch  vs will start after integraitng passes

Notes

This is a link for an old BP execution with old backports BP Execution - Catherine - Build and Test Process - May 27 - Backport Changes - 1 - MXevolve SIZ

The is a link showing failed backports, succeeded backports, and failed backports with definitions deleted   https://mxevolve-dev.cd.murex.com/app/b9d73257-6872-4cd8-92ba-b74223c940e9/business-process/build-and-test-processes/execution/user-story-build-and-test__bc0e5d5d-d2db-4e3c-ad53-a05470fedb8f/integrate-changes
